news.headline: Pintail Coffee in Farmingdale, NY, gets 2024 Minority & Women's Business Award for 100% profit donation to end hunger.
news.summary: A specialty coffee roaster based in Farmingdale, NY has gained recognition for its charitable initiative of donating all profits towards ending hunger. Pintail Coffee, renowned for its premium specialty coffee, announced this significant step on Oct 9, 2024. The company has pledged to allocate 100% of its earnings to local hunger relief efforts. This move highlights Pintail Coffee's commitment to making a positive social impact by addressing food insecurity in the region.

news.headline: UROK Logistics earns SDVBE Certification, showcasing dedication to veteran-owned businesses. Proud to receive recognition.
news.summary: UROK Logistics, a veteran-owned freight brokerage company based in Bristol, Connecticut, has recently been granted the highly-regarded SDVBE Certification. This certification signifies UROK Logistics' dedication to supporting and engaging with veteran-owned businesses. Specializing in providing comprehensive logistics solutions, UROK Logistics has successfully demonstrated their commitment to excellence within the veteran-owned business community. The certification was officially awarded on August 9th, further solidifying UROK Logistics' position as a leading player in the industry.

news.headline: 15th Annual "OC Japan Fair" returns Oct 18-20, 2024, at OC Fair & Event Center. Enjoy 55+ authentic Japanese dishes & more.
news.summary: Orange County is hosting a major Japanese cultural event as the 15th Annual OC Japan Fair makes its return to the OC Fair & Event Center. This celebration features the finest in Japanese cuisine, culture, and art, with a diverse selection of over 55 authentic dishes such as ramen and sushi. The event aims to bring a taste of Tokyo to Southern California, showcasing the rich heritage and traditions of Japan to the community. Attendees can look forward to immersing themselves in the vibrant atmosphere and experiencing the essence of Japanese culture right in their own backyard.

news.headline: Mark Lesko named to 'Long Island Power 100' list. Key numbers: 2024, Greenberg Traurig, Long Island, N.Y., Oct. 9.
news.summary: Mark J. Lesko, a Litigation Practice shareholder at the global law firm Greenberg Traurig, LLP in Long Island, has been recognized on City & State's 2024 "Long Island Power 100" list. The announcement was made in Long Island, N.Y. on October 9, 2024.

news.headline: XR Health obtains patent for VR & AR telecommunication, allowing remote healthcare, personalized treatment & collaboration in virtual environments.
news.summary: XR Health has recently been granted a U.S. patent for its groundbreaking Virtual and Augmented Reality Telecommunication Platforms. This innovation allows for instant remote healthcare delivery, customized treatment options, and collaborative experiences in virtual worlds. The patent covers technologies that facilitate real-time interactions among multiple users in immersive environments for a variety of healthcare applications. The company made the announcement from BOSTON and TEL AVIV, illustrating the global impact of this development. The patent signifies a significant advancement in the realm of healthcare technology, as it opens up new possibilities for personalized care and remote medical assistance.

news.headline: Atlantic Building Solutions becomes official cleaning provider for Clemson Athletics, focusing on maintaining top standards for venues.
news.summary: Clemson University Athletics has selected Atlantic Building Solutions as their official cleaning provider for athletic facilities. This partnership covers venues such as Memorial Stadium and Littlejohn Coliseum to maintain top-notch standards.

news.headline: Turing AI Fellow Jeff Dalton, with 100+ research papers, joins Valence as Head of AI and Chief Scientist.
news.summary: With more than 100 AI research papers under his belt, Jeff Dalton has devoted 20 years to enhancing search algorithms and virtual assistants. His extensive experience will now be utilized at Valence as he takes charge of enhancing their AI-driven leadership coach. The focus will be on creating a platform that offers tailored support by incorporating advanced memory and context capabilities. This initiative aims to break down barriers to learning by providing personalized guidance.

news.headline: Mary Lou Erickson's book "Grace Upon Grace" connects personal experiences and biblical stories to inspire spiritual growth. Price: $14.49.
news.summary: Xulon Press has released an impactful inspirational book focused on promoting personal and spiritual development. Authored by Mary Lou Erickson, "Grace Upon Grace" offers much-needed encouragement and spiritual motivation. Priced at $14.49 for the paperback version, the book is identified by the ISBN 9798868502163. This release came out of ROSCOE, Ill., with the announcement made on Oct. 10, 2024, through PRNewswire-PRWeb.

news.headline: Author David Kerley shares a resilient life journey filled with hope and joy. TAYLORSVILLE, N.C., Oct. 10, 2024.
news.summary: Xulon Press unveils a captivating depiction of the author's journey from the mundane to the remarkable, showcasing resilience and the impact of optimism. In Taylorsville, North Carolina, on October 10, 2024, David Kerley introduces his powerful life narrative in a publication filled with inspiration and hope.

news.headline: Joseph C. Peterson shares life story in book, "How God Helped The Adopted Son." Pricing: Paperback $12.49, e-book $5.99.
news.summary: Xulon Press highlights the power of God in changing lives as Joseph C. Peterson shares his story in "How God Helped The Adopted Son". The book, priced at $12.49 for paperback (ISBN: 9798868504969) and $5.99 for e-book (ISBN: 9798868504976), narrates Peterson's transformative journey.

news.headline: JC Crawford's science fiction novel "Between Two Skies" explores humanity's weight, priced at $15.49, ISBN: 9798868505607.
news.summary: Introducing a new science fiction novel from Liberty Hill Publishing, author JC Crawford brings forth "Between Two Skies". Set to be released in DELAND, Fla. on October 10, 2024, this apocalyptic tale is priced at $15.49 for the paperback edition, with the ISBN 9798868505607. Offering readers a thought-provoking narrative on humanity, this original work is a must-read for fans of the genre.

news.headline: Caspio joins NoCode Summit 2024 in Paris on Oct 16-17 at STATION F to showcase low-code innovation.
news.summary: Caspio, a prominent company specializing in low-code application development, is set to take part in the NoCode Summit 2024, scheduled to be held at STATION F in Paris on October 16-17. This summit focuses on highlighting the capabilities of no-code and low-code technologies, attracting a gathering of visionaries and key figures from the industry. It serves as a platform for collaboration, innovation, and the exchange of insights among participants. The event promises to feature discussions, presentations, and workshops to explore the growing impact of no-code and low-code solutions. Attendees will have the opportunity to engage with leading experts in the field and gain valuable knowledge on leveraging these technologies. With an expected attendance of over 500 professionals from various sectors, the NoCode Summit 2024 aims to drive discussions on the future of application development and digital transformation practices.

news.headline: Caspio to showcase low-code platform at Valencia Digital Summit 2024 on October 23-24 in Valencia, highlighting democratization of app development.
news.summary: Caspio is set to present its advanced low-code application development platform at the Valencia Digital Summit (VDS) 2024, taking place on October 23-24 at the City of Arts and Sciences in Valencia. This event marks Caspio's dedication to making app development accessible by offering innovative solutions.

news.headline: Caspio to showcase low-code tech at Small Business Expo in SF Bay Area on Oct 10, 2024, featuring live demos.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, Caspio, a prominent low-code application development platform, will be demonstrating its technology at the Small Business Expo in the San Francisco Bay Area. The event will take place at the South San Francisco Conference Center, where attendees can witness live demonstrations of Caspio's platform. This showcase aims to highlight the innovative features of Caspio's technology and its benefits for small businesses.

news.headline: Creative Safety Supply introduces 3 tools: free barcode generator, customizable safety signs, and 5S resources for workplace efficiency.
news.summary: Creative Safety Supply recently unveiled three essential tools to boost workplace safety and productivity. These include a complimentary barcode generator for effective inventory and process supervision, a diverse selection of personalized safety signs to adhere to OSHA regulations, and a plethora of 5S educational materials to aid companies in enhancing their operations.

news.headline: Unitek's virtual conference on Sept 13, 2024, had over 1,000 participants aiming to build a healthier future through education and innovation.
news.summary: Health and nursing visionaries joined forces to pave the way for a brighter future at the recent virtual conference held by Unitek in Newport Beach, California on October 10, 2024. The event, Unitek's ninth annual conference, took place on September 13, 2024, with a remarkable turnout of over 1,000 attendees.

news.headline: Article discusses empowering mental health solutions. Millions struggle; explore stories and tools for well-being. LOS ANGELES, Oct. 10, 2024.
news.summary: Discover inspiring narratives and effective strategies to enhance mental wellness amidst widespread challenges. Join countless individuals in harnessing pioneering methods to overcome stress and anxiety. Uncover transformative anecdotes and resources to support your mental well-being journey. Experience a range of uplifting accounts and practical tips to combat isolation and foster personal growth. Explore innovative solutions to navigate the complexities of mental health and empower yourself. Embrace a community dedicated to promoting mental wellness.

news.headline: Improved Pharma is showcasing at AAPS 2024 PHARMSCI 360. Dr. Pamela Smith to present on Oct. 21st at 12:30 PM. Booth #1738, posters M1230-11-62, T1230-11-62, T1530-09-48, W1030-11-61.
news.summary: Join us at Booth number 1738 to explore posters M1230-11-62, T1230-11-62, T1530-09-48, and W1030-11-61 at an event in WEST LAFAYETTE, Indiana. This event will take place on October 21, 2024, with Dr. Pamela Smith, COO of Improved Pharma, presenting on the Physical Stability of Ritonavir Crystallized at 12:30 PM.

news.headline: Cowbell celebrates 1st year in UK with triple-digit growth and Zurich partnership, plans expansion and innovation.
news.summary: A company by the name of Cowbell is focusing on expanding and introducing new products after experiencing a growth of over 100% in the UK. The company, renowned for offering cyber insurance to small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs), has witnessed substantial development in the region. This growth is highlighted by impressive triple-digit numbers and suggests a promising future for Cowbell as it looks towards innovation and expansion. The company's success in the UK market is driving its vision for further growth and diversification in the coming years.

news.headline: New cultural tourism video released by Shanghai's Putuo District during Half Marathon Suzhou Creek Festival showcasing history and attractions.
news.summary: In Beijing on October 10, 2024, the 4th Half Marathon Suzhou Creek Culture and Tourism Festival witnessed the unveiling of Putuo District's latest cultural tourism promotion video from east China's Shanghai. The video aims to highlight the district's charm, cultural heritage, and vibrant business scene. This initiative is part of a wider effort to attract visitors and promote tourism in the region.

news.headline: TUSK Practice Sales facilitated partnership of Central Park West Pediatric Dentistry and Orthodontics with MB2 Dental, a Charlesbank Capital Partners company.
news.summary: In Charlotte, North Carolina on October 10, 2024, TUSK Practice Sales (known as TUSK), a leading M&A Advisor in the healthcare industry, facilitated Central Park West Pediatric Dentistry and Orthodontics in their collaboration with MB2 Dental, a company in the portfolio of Charlesbank Capital Partners. The deal involved...

news.headline: Aquaculture equipment market valued at $18.7 billion in 2023, estimated to reach $37.1 billion by 2033 with 7.2% CAGR.
news.summary: The article discusses a report by Allied Market Research on the global aquaculture equipment market. In 2023, the market was valued at $18.7 billion and is projected to reach $37.1 billion by 2033, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 7.2%. Growth is attributed to increasing global seafood demand, technological advancements, sustainability initiatives, expansion of aquaculture operations in emerging markets, government support, and investment in research and development. Key drivers include advanced technologies for efficient production, automated feeding systems, real-time water quality sensors, and precision aquaculture practices. The industry aims to optimize resource use and enhance operational efficiency while focusing on environmental impact and effective disease management.

news.headline: Japan's Kanda: More recently, the environment surrounding financial markets has been changing.
Huawei's iFTTR OptiXstar F50 wins "Leading In-Home Wi-Fi Service" award at BBWF 2024 in Paris, continuing streak of 6 wins since 2019.
news.summary: Paris, France - On October 10, 2024, at the Network X of Broadband World Forum (BBWF) 2024 in Paris, Huawei's iFTTR OptiXstar F50, the inaugural FTTR+X product, secured recognition with the prestigious "Leading In-Home Wi-Fi Service" accolade. Huawei has maintained a remarkable winning streak, showcasing excellence with six consecutive awards since 2019.

news.headline: BrainCo presents at 2024 Inclusion in Shanghai, focusing on AI and Brain-Computer Interface. Theme: "Technology: Creating a Sustainable Future."
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, the 2024 Inclusion event was held at Shanghai's Huangpu Expo Park under the theme "Technology: Creating a Sustainable Future." This gathering served as a platform for discussions on crucial subjects like "New Practices in Future Industries" and "New Reflections on..." The event attracted a significant number of participants and industry experts, highlighting the importance of technological advancements in shaping a sustainable future.

news.headline: UK lenders see secured lending availability unchanged in three months to end-Nov - BoE Survey.
UK lenders expect unsecured lending availability to increase in three months to end-Nov - BoE Survey.
UK lenders see business lending availability unchanged in three months to end-Nov - BoE Survey.
Global organic sweeteners market valued at $3.5 billion in 2023; expected to reach $7.1 billion by 2033, growing at 7.4% CAGR.
news.summary: The article discusses a report by Allied Market Research on the global organic sweeteners market. The market was valued at $3.5 billion in 2023 and is projected to reach $7.1 billion by 2033, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 7.4% from 2024 to 2033. The growth is attributed to factors such as increasing health consciousness, awareness of the negative effects of refined sugars, expansion of organic food categories, and clean-label product offerings. The market is also benefiting from the wider availability of organic sweeteners through various retail channels and the introduction of new product variants.

news.headline: Global beta glucan market to reach USD 800 million by 2029 with 8.1% CAGR, driven by natural food additives & increasing use in pharmaceuticals and cosmetics. North America leads.
news.summary: The global beta glucan industry is estimated to grow from USD 542 million in 2024 to USD 800 million by 2029, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 8.1%. This growth is driven by factors such as the demand for natural food additives in the food and beverage industry and the use of beta-glucan in pharmaceuticals and cosmetics. The dietary supplement segment is expected to grow the fastest, with yeast emerging as a dominant source of beta glucans due to its efficiency in production. North America leads in the beta-glucan market.

news.headline: Global Composite AI market expected to reach USD 5.6 billion by 2033 with a 19.4% CAGR. Software segment dominated in 2023.
news.summary: The article discusses the recent research report by Custom Market Insights on the Composite AI Market. In 2023, the global market was valued at approximately USD 1.1 billion, expected to reach USD 1.5 billion in 2024, and projected to grow to around USD 5.6 billion by 2033. Composite AI integrates various AI technologies like machine learning and computer vision to address complex challenges effectively. By component, software held the highest market share in 2023, with product design and development being the dominant technique, and banking and financial services as the primary application segment. The North American region is highlighted for its economic strength and technological innovation. Google LLC, known for its technological advancements, is mentioned in the context of AI development. The report projects a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of about 19.4% from 2024 to 2033.

news.headline: Huawei wins "Most Innovative Optical Transport Use Case" award at NGON 2024 in Paris.  #Innovation #Huawei #NGON2024
news.summary: In Paris on October 10, 2024, Huawei was honored with the "Most Innovative Optical Transport Use Case" award at Network X 2024, also referred to as Next-Generation Optical Networks (NGON) 2024. This recognition was granted during the event held in Paris, France. The award specifically acknowledges the device vendor that demonstrates exceptional innovation in optical transport solutions.

news.headline: GenesisCare UK orders RayStation treatment planning system from RaySearch Laboratories AB, a key step for leading cancer care provider.
news.summary: Stockholm, Oct. 10, 2024 - RaySearch Laboratories AB (publ) has confirmed a significant order for the RayStation®* treatment planning system from GenesisCare UK. As the top independent cancer care provider in the UK, GenesisCare operates across 14 specialized outpatient facilities. This latest agreement underscores the growing and notable presence of RaySearch Laboratories in the field of cancer treatment, highlighting the continued trust and demand for their advanced technology in healthcare settings.

news.headline: Breast lesion localization market valued at $1.2B in 2023, set to reach $3.6B by 2033 at 11.7% CAGR due to rising breast cancer cases and technological advancements.
news.summary: The article discusses a report by Allied Market Research on the Breast Lesion Localization Methods Market, stating that it was valued at $1.2 billion in 2023 and is projected to reach $3.6 billion by 2033, with a growth rate of 11.7% from 2024 to 2033. The market growth is attributed to factors such as the increasing prevalence of breast cancer, awareness about early diagnosis, and technological advancements in localization methods. The rise in breast cancer cases globally has led to a higher demand for these methods, with healthcare systems expanding screening programs. Technological innovations like wire-guided localization systems and magnetic tracers have improved procedural outcomes. The report covers the forecast period of 2024-2033, highlighting the growth and importance of breast lesion localization methods in the healthcare industry.

news.headline: Traditional helpdesks may be extinct by 2027, as per Nexthink report. 79% IT workers foresee drastic changes in 3 years, predicting 77% redundancy by 2027.
news.summary: Nexthink, a leading company in Digital Employee Experience (DEX) management, has released a report titled ‘The Death (and Rebirth) of the Service Desk’ discussing the future of IT service desks. According to a survey of 1,000 IT workers worldwide, 79% believe that the current service desk model will undergo significant changes within the next three years. Additionally, 77% of respondents think that advancements in new technologies will make the current service desk obsolete by the year 2027. The report also highlights that 87% of IT workers mention that digital transformation is impacting the way service desks operate.

news.headline: Lactose Intolerance Market to hit US$16.51 Billion by 2031, growing at 6.24% CAGR, as awareness increases about lactose sensitivity.
news.summary: The article discusses the findings of a report by CoherentMI on the Lactose Intolerance Market, forecasting a value of US$10.83 billion in 2024 and a projected growth to US$16.51 billion by 2031, with a CAGR of 6.24% during the period. The rising awareness of lactose intolerance globally, with around 68% of the population suffering from it after infancy, is fueling the demand for lactose-free and low lactose alternatives. Factors like education campaigns, doctor consultations, and online resources are aiding in identifying lactose intolerance. The market is expected to witness significant growth due to increasing incidences of lactose intolerance, the need for lactose-free dairy options, and the shift towards vegan and gluten-free diets.

news.headline: Wynn's investment in UAE casinos pays off despite gambling ban; net profit up by 20%.
European stocks rise before US data; GSK shares surge.

Fortune Europe and Great Place To Work announced the Fortune 100 Best Companies to Work For™ Europe List, based on surveying 1 million employees. Winning companies provide fair promotions, increasing trust levels.
news.summary: Great Place To Work® has partnered with Fortune Europe to release the first Fortune 100 Best Companies to Work For™ Europe List. This list was created by surveying 1.3 million employees across Europe, with 1 million responses coming from eligible companies. To be considered, companies needed 500+ employees and recognition on national Best Workplaces™ lists in specific countries. Winning companies outperform typical workplaces in Europe in fairness, with 78% of employees at the top companies stating promotions are fair and 70% receiving a fair share of profits, in contrast to 37% and 36% respectively in typical workplaces. CEO Michael C. Bush commended the winners for their support during economic challenges, highlighting the importance of trust for future business success. The full article is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Saviynt's Converge Global Tour 2024 London event to be held on October 15, showcasing Identity Cloud platform.
news.summary: Saviynt, a top provider of cloud-native identity and governance platform solutions, is set to host its Converge Global Tour 2024 event in London on October 15. The event will bring together Saviynt executives, customers, partners, industry analysts, and peers to discuss identity security, emerging trends, and best practices. Participants will have the opportunity to explore Saviynt’s converged platform, The Identity Cloud, along with the newly launched Saviynt Intelligence Suite. This event aims to provide insights and updates in the field of identity security.

news.headline: parcelLab and Metapack join forces to provide retailers worldwide with seamless delivery experiences, enhancing customer satisfaction.
news.summary: In London, parcelLab, a prominent global retail, e-commerce, and post-purchase customer experience platform, and Metapack, a leading e-commerce delivery technology company, have revealed a strategic partnership. They seek to offer all-inclusive solutions for retailers globally. By merging their capabilities, parcelLab and Metapack intend to provide the e-commerce sector with smooth delivery experiences that boost growth and improve customer contentment. This collaboration is anticipated to bring significant benefits to the industry.

news.headline: Italian Industrial Production MoM Actual 0.1% (Forecast 0.2%, Previous -0.9%)
BoJ's Former Executive Momma: If the Yen weakens to 150 or 155, it would move rate hike timing forward.
JBS awarded "Best Compliance Dept in Agribusiness" at event with 200+ industry professionals. São Paulo, Oct. 10, 2024.
news.summary: In an event that brought together more than 200 industry experts, a platform was provided for in-depth discussions on current trends and top practices within the agribusiness sector in Brazil and worldwide. The recognition of "Best Compliance Department in Agribusiness" was awarded to JBS at the first edition of the event, held in São Paulo on October 10, 2024.

news.headline: AMRO launched AFSR 2024 on market developments in ASEAN+3, highlighting disinflation and robust growth.
news.summary: AMRO unveiled the ASEAN+3 Financial Stability Report (AFSR 2024) on October 10, 2024. The report delves into market trends and risks within the ASEAN+3 region. It provides in-depth analysis of recent developments while offering insights into potential challenges.

news.headline: Global businesses lose $1.75 trillion due to untapped potential of 627 million excluded from online services by Sumsub.
news.summary: Today, on World Inclusion Day, Sumsub has introduced 'Greenflag,' a digital platform aimed at providing access to online services for a massive 627 million people worldwide who are currently excluded. This initiative comes as a response to the global issue of hundreds of millions of individuals being unable to utilize various online services.

news.headline: Washington, D.C.-area residents come together for Shatterproof event on Oct. 19 to fight addiction stigma. Research shows high stigma levels.
news.summary: A recent study uncovered substantial stigma and misconception surrounding a manageable health issue. Taking place on Saturday, October 19, at 8:00 a.m., an event will be held in Washington, D.C., aiming to increase awareness about addiction and encourage local residents to combat the stigma associated with it.

news.headline: AirConsole partners with Volkswagen, offering in-car gaming on select models, with debut of Trivia Crack. Exciting advancement in entertainment.
news.summary: Today, in Zurich on October 10, 2024, the innovative in-car gaming platform AirConsole has reported the commencement of its services on specific Volkswagen models. This recent incorporation represents a notable advancement in in-car entertainment, providing AirConsole access to a broader audience.

news.headline: Dr. Aleksandar Simic of FTC Group named "CEO of the Year in the Business Aviation Industry" in 2024 CEO Awards.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on October 10, 2024, Business Worldwide Magazine recognized Dr. Aleksandar Simic of FTC Group as the recipient of the prestigious "CEO of the Year in the Business Aviation Industry" award for 2024. This distinction is part of the annual CEO Awards, a renowned platform that honors top C-level leaders in various industries. Dr. Simic's exceptional leadership and contributions to the business aviation sector have earned him this esteemed accolade, underscoring his significant impact on the industry.

news.headline: Verkkokauppa.com will release its Interim Report for Jan-Sep 2024 on October 24, 2024.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has reached 6.5%, with a total of 10.4 million people currently out of work. This represents a significant increase from the previous quarter and is the highest the unemployment rate has been in several years. Additionally, it was disclosed that average hourly wages have decreased by 2.3% compared to the same period last year. Experts attribute these concerning statistics to the ongoing economic uncertainty and the impact of the global pandemic on various industries. The government has announced plans to implement new policies and initiatives to address the rising unemployment rate and stimulate economic growth in the coming months.
